Generalist software developer interested in building useful products and learning modern stacks.

SUMMARY
Developer with broad experience across web projects, documentation, and team support.

EXPERIENCE
- Helped maintain a web application by fixing bugs and updating user-facing text.
- Supported a small team with documentation, testing, and release coordination.
- Built a few frontend features using JavaScript and React.
- Assisted with basic SQL queries and report updates when needed.
- Participated in code reviews and meetings with product stakeholders.

PROJECTS
- Personal portfolio site and a task tracker prototype.
- Small class project that stored notes in a simple database.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
JavaScript, React, HTML, CSS, basic SQL, documentation, teamwork
